recommended.song_name: As Long As You Love Me

content:
Already Gone

Capo 2

         [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]Dsus4[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
 Remember all the things we wanted, now all our memories they're haunted,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 we were always meant to say goodbye...[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]Dsus4[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
 Even with our fists held high it, never would have worked out right yeah,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 we were never meant for 'do or die'...[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]C[/ch]
 I didn't want us to burn out, I, didn't come here to hurt you now[/tab]

 I can't stop...


 [Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 I want you to know, that it doesn't matter where we take this road,[/tab]

 someone's gotta go...
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus4[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                        [ch]Em[/ch]  
 And I want you to know, you couldn't have loved me better,[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 but I want you to move on, so I'm already gone...[/tab]


 [Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]
 Looking at you makes it harder, but I know that you'll find another,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 that doesn't always make you want to cry...[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]Dsus4[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
 Started with a perfect kiss then, we could feel the poison set in,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 perfect couldn't keep this love alive...[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
 You know that I love you so, I, love you enough to let you go...[/tab]


 [Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    
 I want you to know, that it doesn't matter where we take this road,[/tab]

 someone's gotta go...
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
 And I want you to know, you couldn't have loved me better, [/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 but I want you to move on, so I'm already gone...[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Dsus4[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
 I'm already gone, already gone,[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                                             
 you can't make it feel right, when you know that its wrong...[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Em[/ch]
 I'm already gone, already gone,[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Cadd9[/ch]  
 there's no moving on, so I'm already gone...[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]              
 Already gone, already gone,already gone...[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D/F#[/ch]          [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 I'm, already gone, already gone, already gone, yeah...[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]D/F#[/ch]                  
 remember all the things we wanted, now all our memories they're haunted[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
 we were always meant to say goodbye...[/tab]


 [Chorus]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]              [ch]Dsus4[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]                      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
